lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh hey, are you the Duke?

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Shh shh, now is not your time to speak.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhh...

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Oh Great One, do I have to have broccoli for dinner?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: Yes, Definitely.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: I hates broccoli, why must it torture me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uhh...

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Why are they here, you didn't command it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean? I was told to come here.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: We're not talking to you.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Great round one, should I rid us of this intruder?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: Ask again later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is going on here, why are you talking to an egg?

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: The Omlettesiah feels generous today, what do you want and why are you here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not sure, I was told to come here when I stepped out of the portal.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: WHAT DID YOU SAY?!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uuh, I mean, I was told to come here... after I hopped out of the portal.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: YOU CAME BACK? THE EGG DIDN'T COMMAND IT.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: We need to punish them, but you have commanded me to wait...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you talking to?

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Our wise ruler, the divine egg. It is our great leader.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: It appeared to me one night when I was down by the coast, I have been its loyal servant ever since.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: I am its voice, I give action to its words, it serves a greater good than we can understand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you talking about that egg on the table?

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: YOU'RE TALKING TO A POWER YOU CANNOT COMPREHEND.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow... well then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe there's someone more reasonable I can talk to.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Great round one, will Jessica Rabbit ever love me?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: Outlook not so good.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: The almighty egg, will my kingdom ever fall?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: Concentrate and ask again.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: My mighty yolk, do you think I'd look good in a top hat?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: As I see it, yes.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Oh wise one, is there a wiser ruler than I?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: My sources say no.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Great golden one, will I gain incredible riches this year?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: Better not tell you now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe there's someone more sane I can talk to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Paws is probably the best person to talk to right now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your Dukeness, I've discovered a revelation!

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: What do they want, why can't they leave us?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That egg on the table... it is a fake!

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Don't be so foolish, of course it's real.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you know? Someone could have easily swapped it out for a fake one.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: That doesn't make sense, if this is a fake, how did you find the original?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I uh, found it in a burrow underneath the castle.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Unlikely story. Since I found it, I've been watching it like a falcon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you don't trust me, why don't you ask that egg?

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Fine, but if you're trying to trick us, we'll dispose of you.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Your magical eggness: Are you a fake version and does this coney hold the real one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: -Sweating profusely- ...

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: Without a doubt.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: What the flying carrot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Phew... see, I told you it's fake.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: I can't believe it, how long have I been made a fool of?

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Give me the real one, we need to rid ourselves of this imposter.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm glad we got that sorted, feel free to ensure it works properly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll uh, dispose of this one for you.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Wise one: Do I have to have broccoli with my carrots tonight?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: [chosen negative option]

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Yes! Just what I wanted to hear, thank you for your help.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: I will let you ask but one question to the great supreme.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, ghee thanks, I'm not sure what to ask, maybe...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Egg: Should rabbits keep jumping through the strange portal that no one knows where it leads to?

lines.speaker: Magic Egg
lines.text: [chosen negative option]

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Well, that settles it, I'll send the order for all rabbits to cease jumping through the portal at once.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: You may leave me, keep that fake egg and dispose of it.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: I'll also let everyone know you're a good rabbit, so if they need a paw, don't hesitate to help out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great! I should return to Gelt to let him know what has happened.

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: Leave me, I have many questions to ask the mythical one.

sections.title: Attempting to take The Magic Egg

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: What are you doing?! Step away from it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry Duke...

sections.title: Attempting to talk to The Magic Egg

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Big Egg, will I ever...

lines.speaker: Duke Rabbacio
lines.text: None can talk to it except me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry Duke...
